text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Owww... Phew, that sure startled me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll have to follow the doctor's orders and
rest for a few days...
choice_data_list:
I'm sorry! This was my fault for being
inattentive!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I'm totally fine, so you don't have to get
all upset!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for giving me emergency treatment right
away, Trainer. That helped a lot with the pain.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're really amazing! You're as incredible as the
highest-ranking sumo wrestlers out there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Speaking of, let's get back to training!
choice_data_list: Why don't we observe others today?
If you feel any pain at all, we're stopping, okay?
If you feel any pain at all, we're stopping, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Speaking of, let's get back to training!
choice_data_list: Why don't we observe others today?
If you feel any pain at all, we're stopping, okay?
If you feel any pain at all, we're stopping, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Okay. I guess learning by observation is
important too.
choice_data_list:
We can use what you learn once your leg heals
up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! All right, I'll do my best to soak up
everything I see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop Hishi Akebono from running and have her
rest until the doctor gives her the okay to start
training again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Let's get started right awa—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer... I know I shouldn't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I thought, it's too dangerous to let her run
like this. I decide to have Hishi Akebono rest until
her leg is fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to enjoying every dish
on the training menu you came up with!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here's to a buono training session! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By taking special consideration of her injury and
staying focused, we get through practice without
any issues!
